step_rationale: SLAM adhesion molecule stabilizing platelet–platelet interactions in thrombus.
mechanism: CD84 mediates platelet-to-platelet adhesion and thrombus stabilization during coronary occlusion.

references.title: Mice lacking the SLAM family member CD84 display unaltered platelet function in hemostasis and thrombosis.
Platelet aggregation induces platelet aggregate stability via SLAM family receptor signaling.
